component.name: SUPER IDE
component.summary: Lightweight desktop IDE with built-in AI features that stay dormant until needed

description.p: SUPER IDE is a lightweight desktop IDE built on Rust. It combines a fast, native editor with VS Code-like workflows, modern orange branding, and built-in AI features that stay dormant until you explicitly open chat or provider settings.

ul.li: Fast startup and low RAM usage
Modal editing (Vim-like) support as a first class citizen
AI chat, agent mode, and multi-provider support (lazy-loaded)
